name: SEREED Baby Balance Bike for 1 Year Old Boys Girls 12-24 Month Toddler Balance Bike, 4 Wheels Toddler First Bike, First Birthday Gifts
bullets: GROW IN FUN: Recommended ages for 12-24 months. The infant balance bike is the best birthday gift for toddlers to learn walking and riding. It helps to develop babies' balance, steering, coordination, and gain confidence at an early age.
SAFELY RIDE: No pedal and fully widened closed wheel to avoid clamping baby's feet. 135 ° turning limit and gravity steering without leaving the ground to prevent the baby from turning over.

STURDY & COMFORTABLE DESIGN: The mini balance bike equips sturdy aluminum alloy frame, non-slip TPU handle, and a softly supportive seat.The mini balance bike wheels are non-slip, wear-resistant and non-destructive floor, and baby can ride indoors or outdoors.
PERFECT GIFT FOR BABIES: This baby balance bike is made of high-quality material. This ensures that they are safe for any baby. Safe design can be assured as gift for 1 year old boys and girls.

EASY TO CARRY: With only 1.6kg (3.6 pounds) of weight, both you and your children can easily carry it around to play. Increased the children’s interest, no need to worry about the children giving up because they can’t move it without your help.
description: The Baby Balance bikes are designed to help baby develop balance through an intuitive process of first walking while sitting over the saddle, then gliding with feet lifted, help baby build confidence, independence and coordination in the early stages.

reviews.name: Valerie Durham
reviews.title: Perfect first bike for toddlers - my 1-year-old loves it!
reviews.body: This baby balance bike is absolutely perfect for toddlers! My 1-year-old took to it immediately and has been having a blast. The 4-wheel design is genius for this age — it provides perfect stability while they're learning. The bike is lightweight enough for little ones to handle but solid and well-built. The colorful design is adorable and the materials are clearly safe and high-quality. Assembly…

reviews.name: HT
reviews.title: Great balance bike
reviews.body: I purchased the SEREED Baby Balance Bike for a one-year-old, and I think it’s a great value for the price. The bike is sturdy, lightweight, and easy to assemble. It feels safe and well-designed for toddlers who are just starting to explore movement and develop their balance.The child enjoys riding it around the house, and it’s a fun way to encourage active play while helping build coordination…

reviews.name: PEBerg
reviews.title: Fun, cute, and sturdy beginner bike
reviews.body: Little one’s 7-year-old sibling took charge of the delivery, opened the box, put the bike together, and began riding it around the house! I had to intervene so the 18-month old could try it. He got a great big smile when he started riding it. Now he sometimes slips back on the seat and tries to push it like one of his push toys, but we’ve only had it for two days, so he is still learning how to…

reviews.name: Quality Shopaholic
reviews.title: Great starter bike for toddler!
reviews.body: If you have a cautious and shy toddler, like mine, this bike is the perfect bike to get them comfortable balancing on a bike. My daughter is 23 months (we started a bit late as we have another balance bike that was too intimidating for her). This bike provides an easy set up, great quality, and is super light and functional to bring on trips to the park! The 4 wheels makes it so much easier for…
